ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, HR manager, recruiter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the recruitment strategy */,
  "never_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if the strategy is never used */,
  "occasionally_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if the strategy is occasionally used */,
  "often_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if the strategy is often used */,
  "always_used" INTEGER /* Indicates if the strategy is always used */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the strategy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the strategy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_strategies_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each impact record */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recruitment strategy */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Description of the impact of the strategy on workforce management */,
  "effectiveness_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the effectiveness of the strategy (1-10) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the impact record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the impact record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the impact record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_impact_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES recruitment_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_impact_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the training program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training program */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the training program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the training program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_programs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_redefinitions" (
  "redefinition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job redefinition */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job redefinition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the job redefinition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job redefinition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the job redefinition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("redefinition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_redefinitions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advertising_spends" (
  "spend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each advertising spend */,
  "advertising_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for advertising (e.g., social media, job boards) */,
  "spend_amount" TEXT /* Amount spent on advertising */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the advertising spend record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advertising spend record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the advertising spend record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advertising_spends_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainee_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainee program */,
  "trainee_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the trainee */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainee program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trainee program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trainee program */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the trainee program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trainee program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trainee program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trainee_programs_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruitment_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruitment metric */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recruitment strategy */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the recruitment metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the recruitment metric */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the recruitment metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recruitment metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the recruitment metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_metrics_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruitment_metrics_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES recruitment_strategies ("strategy_id")
)
